name: IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_VL
query: SELECT IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.ROUTING_STEP_ID ROUTING_STEP_ID, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.ACTION_ID ACTION_ID, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.TRIGGER_EVENT_CODE TRIGGER_EVENT_CODE, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.TRACE_LOG TRACE_LOG, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_TL.ACTION_NAME ACTION_NAME, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_TL.ACTION_DESCRIPTION ACTION_DESCRIPTION, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.STEP_ACTION_USAGE_CODE STEP_ACTION_USAGE_CODE, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.LAST_EXECUTION_DATE LAST_EXECUTION_DATE, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.LAST_EXECUTION_RESULT LAST_EXECUTION_RESULT, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.SETTING_ID SETTING_ID FROM IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B, IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_TL WHERE IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_B.STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID = IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_TL.STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID AND IRC_LC_ACTION_USAGES_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
